content.en:
Source Sea.

The birthplace of the Eternal Treasure, Ye Tian and the five Legendary Realm Lords of the Space-Time Territory are all here.

At this time, Lord Ice Han proposed: "Everyone, the Eternal Arcana is very rare, and it is very difficult to take it, if any of us take it, it will belong to whom, and we must not fight each other, how about it?"

"I agree!"

The Holy Peak Lord immediately agreed.

And several other Legendary Realm Lords also agreed, Ye Tian naturally agreed, he couldn't resist the union of the other five Legendary Realm Lords, this time against the Dark Mist Lord, if any of the Legendary Realm Lords helped, he would not be able to kill the Clone of the Dark Mist Lord.

He didn't want to be targeted, so he agreed to Lord Ice's proposal.

However, everyone made it clear that the Immortal Realm Lord would not be allowed to approach this place, and it would be difficult to deal with it if the Eternal Arcana was taken away by an Immortal Realm Lord.

Although the possibility of the Immortal Realm Lord taking the Eternal Arcana is too small, it must not be ignored.

Of course, if other Immortal Realms also had the same combat power as Ye Tian, they would naturally be qualified to participate, but there was only one Immortal Realm Lord like Ye Tian in the space-time territory.

Next, Ye Tian and the five Legendary Realm Lords sealed off this area, not allowing any living beings to approach here.

And Ye Tian also arranged several replica bodies in the Dark Forbidden Domain to prevent the Dark Mist Lord from running back and destroying the Dark Forbidden Domain.

This possibility is very small, but Ye Tian also has to take precautions.

......

Ye Tian knew that if he wanted to take away the Eternal Treasure, he had to comprehend the corresponding Eternal Dao, and he had to enter before he could take the Eternal Treasure, otherwise he would need the strength of the Legendary Realm, and the Legendary Realm Lords present did not have that kind of strength.

Still, the five Legendary Realm Lords gave it a try.

Rumble!!!!

The five Legendary Realm Lords rushed to the location where the Eternal Arcana was located, but they flew for a long time, but they didn't get close to the Eternal Arcana.

Then they sat down honestly and comprehended the Eternal Path.

Obviously, they also knew the way to obtain the Eternal Treasure, after all, they had been the Lord of the Legendary Realm for a long time, and they didn't know how many inheritances they had obtained, so it was not strange to know this secret.

Ye Tian also immediately began to comprehend the eternal path contained in this eternal treasure, only to see Ye Tian's will continue to approach the eternal treasure, comprehend the breath of the eternal treasure, and thus comprehend its eternal way.

After a long time, Ye Tian roughly knew what the eternal path contained in this leaf-like eternal treasure.

"Wan Sheng'!"

"Differentiation!"

These are the two eternal ways.

The Eternal Dao of Ten Thousand Lives is an eternal path that can restore injuries and heal the injuries of all things or restore the life of all things, and differentiation is an eternal path that can be differentiated into a pseudo-doppelganger, similar to the Dark Mist Lord's Dark Mist Shadow Body, in fact, the effect is almost the same, if the Differentiated Eternal Dao is cultivated to the extreme, a real doppelganger can be permanently formed.

For many Eternal Realms, if you want to add a clone, you can cultivate the Differentiation Eternal Dao.

However, the true Eternal Path is difficult to get started, and it is naturally even more difficult to cultivate to the extreme.

"It's still the cultivation of the Eternal Dao of Ten Thousand Lives, if you can cultivate it to the beginning, you can also take this Eternal Treasure!"

Ye Tian decided.

Ye Tian's realm is only the Immortal Realm, and compared to the Legendary Realm Lord, the realm is much lower, but he has a lot of Legendary Ancestral Endowments and Immortal Ancestral Endowments, so he has a huge advantage in comprehending the Eternal Dao.

Moreover, Ye Tian can also use the copy body to study the eternal path of ten thousand lives, and use his own body as an experiment, and he can also increase the speed of enlightenment.

Therefore, Ye Tian was fully sure that he could take the lead in comprehending the eternal path of ten thousand lives, so as to take away this eternal treasure.

And the five Legendary Realm Lords are destined to only be happy in vain.

Time passed slowly, and before I knew it, 10,000 eternal years had passed in the source sea.

And Ye Tian and the five Legendary Realm Lords have been practicing in retreat here for so long.

The five Legendary Realm Lords seemed to be very patient, perhaps for them, 10,000 Eternal Years was just a very short time, and they were still unflustered, as if they didn't think that others could cultivate the Eternal Dao contained in the Eternal Treasure in such a short period of time.

But what they didn't know was that Ye Tian had really introduced the cultivation of the Eternal Dao of Ten Thousand Lives.

"Eternal Dao of Ten Thousand Lives, Entry!"

Ye Tian opened his eyes, and there was joy in his eyes.

Immediately, he walked towards the power of the Eternal Treasure, the Eternal Dao of Ten Thousand Lives, and the endless time and space were squeezed out by Ye Tian.

Soon, Ye Tian walked in front of the Eternal Treasure and grabbed it with one hand.

Airplanes!!!!

The leaf-like eternal treasure fell in front of Ye Tian and truly became a thing in Ye Tian's hands.

"Eternal treasure indeed!"

It used to be 99 percent likely, but now it's in your hand, it's 100 percent sure.

Whoa!!!

Ye Tian's replica body descended here, which was to ensure the safety of the Eternal Treasure.

After all, in the face of an Eternal Treasure, he was not afraid that the other five Legendary Realm Lords would not be able to help but make a move.

If he really does it, he can't resist, so he can only flee from Yuanhai with his relatives.

But the five Legendary Realm Lords will have to face his revenge in the future.

"'What, the Endless Lord has taken the Eternal Arcana?'

"How could he comprehend one of the Eternal Dao of Ten Thousand Lives and the Eternal Dao of Differentiation so quickly, we are Legendary Realm Lords, and we are far from cultivating to the beginning?

"Unless he's been in contact with the Eternal Dao of Ten Thousand Lives and the Eternal Dao of Differentiation before, that's why he's just getting started so quickly this time!

At this time, the five Legendary Realm Lords showed indifference one by one, and they couldn't wait to go up and grab it immediately.

But they were very hesitant, if they snatched it, it would completely offend Ye Tian, and they might not even be able to snatch it.

In case Ye Tian escaped, when Ye Tian broke through to the Legendary Realm Lord and returned to the space-time territory, it would be their doom.

After all, Ye Tian was too demonic, and they had to admit that they were far inferior to Ye Tian in terms of talent and (good) qualifications.

So, they didn't dare to take risks.

"Congratulations to the Endless Lord!"

Lord Binghan took the lead in congratulating, her congratulations showed her attitude, she could be regarded as completely giving up on seizing the Eternal Treasure, and recognized that this Eternal Treasure belonged to Ye Tian's hands.

Subsequently, several other Legendary Realm Lords congratulated Ye Tian one after another, and they didn't make a move, after all, the price of doing it was too great, they were Legendary Realm Lords, they were the real controllers of the space-time territory, and they were eternal and immortal existences, so there was no need to take such risks.

Now that the first Eternal Treasure has been born in the Source Sea, maybe a second or even a third Eternal Treasure will be born in the future, and maybe it will fall on their heads.

So, they resisted the idea of doing it

"Thank you!"

Ye Tian thanked, and at the same time breathed a sigh of relief, after all, if he didn't tear his face, the Dark Forbidden Domain and his family would be safe, otherwise he would not be able to guarantee their safety. _
